title: Assigning activity source type in Activities board in CRM
excerpt: I am trying to add the Activity Source “Type” (contact, lead, account, deal) as a separate column for each item. Does anyone know a way to do this?

posts.author: Charlie_F (Charlie)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to add the Activity Source “Type” (contact, lead, account, deal) as a separate column for each item. Does anyone know a way to do this?

image920×393 30.1 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Charlie,

Is “source type” a column you’d like to mirror from your “source” board that is currently connected?
